line_1: When, starting from our slumberous apathy,
line_2: We gaze upon the scenes of days gone by.

line_1: And for life's trials arm cold apathy.
Nor cold disdain meets careless apathy;
line_2: The feeling shed not still the tear of joy,

line_1: Deep sunk in sullen, hopeless apathy!
line_2: O wretched state, where our best feelings lie

line_1: There rous'd again to study'd apathy.
line_2: Here all the kind affections, touch'd, comply;
